---
title: "Slides"
subtitle: "MILS 2026: Intro to R"
date: 2026-04-15
date-format: long
date-modified: last-modified
author:
  - name: Ludovic De Cuypere
    orcid: 0000-0002-0050-1097
    email: Ludovic.De.Cuypere@vub.be
    affiliations: Vrije Universiteit Brussel & Ghent University
---

:::{.callout-note}
In order to see the slides full screen, click on a slide and press `f`. Press `esc` to go back to normal rendering.
:::


```{=html}
<iframe width="800" height="600" src="Slides_IntroR.html" title="IntroR_Slides"></iframe>
```
